mnemonics.title: Seven Core Principles - RKMWBPT
mnemonics.content:
R - Reason it exists (value)
K - KISS (simple)
M - Maintain vision
W - What you produce, others consume
B - Be open to future
P - Plan for reuse
T - Think!

mnemonics.title: 80-20 Rule for Testing
mnemonics.content:
20% of code = 80% of defects

Focus testing efforts on:
- Complex modules
- Frequently changed code
- High-risk areas
